questionText: Break down your total gross global Scope 2 emissions by business activity.
questionKo: 사업 활동별로 총 글로벌 Scope 3 배출량을 세분화하십시오.
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Reporting emissions by activity allows a more in-depth understanding of business risks related to future regulation and climate-related issues, and allows organizations to identify potential opportunities to reduce emissions associated with operational activities.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "By activity" in response to 7.20.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항 만 표시됩니다 만약 귀사 선택 "기준 활동" 응답 7.20.

guidance.text:
Activity (column 1) 
Using no more than 500 characters, disclose the activity you are disclosing Scope 2 emissions for.
Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e) (column 2) 
Report your organization's Scope 2 emissions in CO2e for the activity reported in column 1, on a location-based method, i.e. reflecting the average emissions intensity of grids on which energy consumption occurs.
Negative numbers are not allowed as organizations are to report gross, not net figures.
Emissions figures should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e) (column 3) 
This column only appears if you select "We are reporting a Scope 2, market-based figure" in column "Scope 2, market-based" of 7.3.
Report your organization's Scope 2 emissions in CO2e for the activity reported in column 1, on a market-based method, i.e. reflecting emissions from electricity that companies have purposefully chosen (or their lack of choice).
Negative numbers are not allowed as organizations are to report gross, not net figures.
Emissions figures should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
Note for agricultural sectors 
You should provide Scope 2 emissions data pertaining to all your relevant business activity areas (i.e., agriculture/forestry, processing/manufacturing, and/or distribution), as indicated in 1.11.
Note for organizations responding to high-impact sector requests 
If your company's primary CDP sector is one of the following: OG, CO,TO, TS, MM, ST, CH or CE, the response to 7.20.3 is not required. Organizations responding to these requests are presented with additional questions on this topic (7.21,, 7.42, 7.42.1) relating specifically to activities in the sector. Your primary CDP sector is displayed in your response dashboard.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
Either column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' OR 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' completed.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) OR
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is NOT equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) AND
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is NOT equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) 또는 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반...' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) - 1 점 이 경로에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다. 또는 경로 B) 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 아님 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) 및 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 아님 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반...' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 최대 0/3점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria: Not scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 채점하지 않습니다.

criteria.criteria: Not scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 채점하지 않습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
Either column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' OR 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' completed.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) OR
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is NOT equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) AND
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is NOT equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) 또는 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반...' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) - 1 점 이 경로에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다. 또는 경로 B) 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 아님 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 위치/지역-기반' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) 및 합계 의 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반 (미터톤 CO2e)' 아님 같음 수치 제공된 열 'Scope 2, 시장-기반...' 행 '보고연도' 문항 7.7 (± 5%) - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 최대 0/3점을 받을 수 있습니다.

change.question_ko: 사업 활동별로 총 글로벌 Scope 3 배출량을 세분화하십시오.
change.q2025_text: Break down your total gross global Scope 2 emissions by business activity.
change.scoring_change_summary: CC All sectors excluding Financial services Awareness • Clarification to ROUTE B that this checks if both cross checks with 7.7 are not met for location and market based. Clarification added to make ROUTE B distinct from ROUTE A.
change.daml_summary: General: D 4/4 | A 0 or 1/1 or 3 | M 0/0 | L 0/0

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 시멘트,, &, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '사업 활동별로 총 글로벌 Scope 3 배출량을 세분화하십시오. `'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
